query_title: Old Men in New Cars: In China They Eat Dogs II

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: White Oleander
recommendations.overview: A teenager journeys through a series of foster homes after her mother goes to prison for committing a crime of passion.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: The Abyss
recommendations.overview: As the Swedish town of Kiruna sinks, Frigga finds herself torn between her family and her job as security chief at the world's largest underground mine.

recommendations.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
recommendations.overview: Swedish thriller based on Stieg Larsson's novel about a male journalist and a young female hacker. In the opening of the movie, Mikael Blomkvist, a middle-aged publisher for the magazine Millennium, loses a libel case brought by corrupt Swedish indus

recommendations.title: Mr. Monk's Last Case: A Monk Movie
recommendations.overview: Monk steps out of retirement as his stepdaughter's wedding turns tragic when her fiancé dies in a bungee jumping accident.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: Get the Grift
recommendations.overview: After a botched scam, Clóvis bumps into Lohane, his estranged foster sister. In a bind, they soon realize the only way out is to band together.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.
